top_tweets.text:
How much of SQLite, FFmpeg, PHP compiler can LMs code from scratch? Given just an executable and no starter code or internet access.

Introducing ProgramBench: 200 rigorous, whole-repo generation tasks where models design, build, and ship a working program end to end. 🧵 https://t.co/8ayeDJLXaJ
top_tweets.author: jyangballin
top_tweets.name: John Yang
top_tweets.summary_zh: ProgramBench 推出 200 個高難度整庫生成任務，測試 LLM 能否在沒有起始程式碼或網路的情況下，從零重寫 SQLite、FFmpeg 等知名專案。衡量模型端到端設計、建構與交付完整程式的能力。

top_tweets.text:
the most underrated design tip is to be mindful of how your copywriting breaks to lines and creates shapes in a composition

you should be aggressively comfortable rewriting sentences to avoid widows or to make the "visual shape" of paragraphs more uniform and satisfying
top_tweets.author: raunofreiberg
top_tweets.name: rauno
top_tweets.summary_zh: 最被低估的設計技巧：留意文案如何換行與形成視覺形狀，應主動改寫句子以避免孤字（widow）並讓段落外型更一致、更令人滿意。

top_tweets.text: Possibly the most impactful design in my career will be making Clawd the essence of Claude Code. And I have no regrets.
top_tweets.author: meag_han_c
top_tweets.name: Meaghan
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者認為將 Clawd 設計成 Claude Code 的核心形象是職業生涯中最具影響力的設計之一，且毫不後悔。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
